runbook.label: Host diagnostics
runbook.dockerDiskUsageDesc: See how much space images and containers use on disk.
runbook.runningContainersDesc: List containers that are up right now.
runbook.dockerServiceLogDesc: Recent systemd journal lines for the Docker daemon.
runbook.largestCacheFoldersDesc: Find heavy cache directories under your home folder.
runbook.lead: Safe, read-only host probes. Results open in a panel below — no terminal copy/paste.
health.title: Health Checks
compose.errorMarkers: Error markers found in compose logs.
cleanup.hostCache: Use runbook command templates for host cache cleanup.
cleanup.logCleanup: Job logs are session-bound; app log cleanup is manual currently.
schedule.openItems: Open items from Schedule → Maintenance Tasks. Checking a box here updates the same list.
schedule.remindersLead: Browser notification nudge — does not run tasks automatically.
health.noDiagnostics: No diagnostics run yet. Run checks above, then use host actions for deeper probes.
health.diagnosticsLead: Quick health checks for Docker, security, Git, SSH, runtimes, performance, and accessibility.
health.runDesc: Runs all checks below and shows plain-language results.
health.exportDesc: Save a support bundle you can attach to bug reports.
health.includeSensitiveDesc: Adds tokens and paths — only enable when sharing with someone you trust.
overview.realDataNote: Live data from host metrics, Docker, and Guardian layers — not simulated.
overview.checklistLead: Open tasks from your schedule — open Schedule to manage all of them.
overview.navLead: Detailed tools live on their own tabs — not duplicated here.
overview.nav.cleanupDesc: Quick cache, log, and optional Docker prune actions.
overview.nav.dataDesc: Compose profile health and optional system services.
overview.nav.logsDesc: Job runner, history, and integrity checks.
overview.nav.scheduleDesc: Maintenance tasks, cron hints, and host probes.
cleanup.lead: Lightweight housekeeping. For full Docker cleanup, use the Docker page.
systemd.notInstalled: Service not installed on this machine.
systemd.notInstalledOptional: Not installed — optional on this distro. Install the package if you need it.
systemd.startFailed: Could not start service. You may need to approve the system prompt.
systemd.docker.title: Docker
systemd.docker.desc: Container engine — required for compose profiles and cleanup.
systemd.ssh.title: SSH server
systemd.ssh.desc: Remote shell access (sshd or ssh unit, depending on distro).
systemd.nginx.title: Nginx
systemd.nginx.desc: Web server for local dev stacks and reverse proxy.
systemd.ufw.title: Firewall (UFW)
systemd.ufw.desc: Uncomplicated Firewall — blocks unexpected inbound traffic.
infra.lead: Compose profile health and core Linux services your dev stack depends on.
infra.systemServicesLead: Start stopped services with one click. Linux may ask for your admin password.
docker.lead: Reclaim disk space from unused Docker objects. Counts come from a live prune preview.
docker.containersDesc: Remove stopped containers you no longer need.
docker.volumesDesc: Remove unused volumes (can delete data — review counts first).
tasks.lead: Track recurring chores. Cron presets are hints — LuminaDev does not schedule them automatically yet.
tasks.cronEvery6hDesc: Good for cache sweeps and light housekeeping.
tasks.cronDaily3amDesc: Runs once per night while you sleep.
diag.docker.fail.summary: Docker or Compose is missing or not working.
diag.docker.fail.hint: docker={{docker}} compose={{compose}} — install or start Docker first.
diag.security.pass.hint: Firewall is active and SSH password login is disabled.
diag.security.warn.summary: Firewall is active — optional SSH hardening remains.
diag.security.fail.hintFirewall: Firewall is not active — your machine accepts more inbound traffic than necessary.
diag.security.fail.hintSshPassword: SSH allows password login — prefer key-based auth for safer remote access.
diag.security.fail.hintBoth: Firewall is off and SSH password login is enabled.
diag.security.fail.hintGeneric: Review firewall and SSH settings on this machine.
diag.git.pass.hint: Commit author name and email are set for this machine.
diag.git.fail.summary: Git user.name or user.email is missing.
diag.git.fail.hint: name={{name}} email={{email}} — set both before committing.
diag.ssh.pass.hint: You can use this key for GitHub, GitLab, or remote servers.
diag.ssh.fail.summary: No SSH key found on this machine.
diag.ssh.fail.hint: Generate or import a key to push code and connect securely.
diag.runtimes.pass.hint: {{count}} of 3 core runtimes (Node, Python, Rust) are ready.
diag.runtimes.fail.hint: Only {{count}} of 3 core runtimes installed — install the rest from Runtimes.
diag.perf.pass.summary: App memory use is within normal range.
diag.perf.fail.summary: App is using more memory than expected.
diag.perf.fail.hint: RSS is {{rss}} MB — restart the app if it feels sluggish.
diag.a11y.pass.hint: Labels, landmarks, and focusable elements look reasonable.
diag.a11y.fail.summary: Accessibility issues found in the UI.
diag.a11y.fail.hint: {{unlabeledInputs}} unlabeled input(s), {{unlabeledButtons}} unlabeled button(s), {{imagesMissingAlt}} image(s) missing alt text. These are app UI labels — no automatic fix is available here.
guardian.description: Each layer reads a specific IPC signal. The headline score is <0>100</0> minus the deductions shown on failing layers (floored at 0). This is the coded definition of "Guardian" in this app — not a separate marketing score.
layerPressure.excellent_desc: System is idle or lightly loaded
layerTooltip.memory_pressure: RAM and swap usage on this machine
layerTooltip.storage_pressure: Disk space used on primary mounts
layerTooltip.container_fleet: Share of Docker containers that are stopped or crashed
layerTooltip.process_health: Highest CPU or memory use among top processes
layerTooltip.host_security: Firewall status and SSH password authentication
checklist.noTasks: No open tasks. Add reminders from the Schedule tab.
tasks.noTasks: No maintenance tasks yet. Use the host actions below — output opens in a panel (no terminal copy/paste).
jobs.description: Long-running work from the background job runner (install runtimes, etc.). Polls with the maintenance page refresh.
